title: Viking Therapeutics Announces Pricing of $550 Million Public Offering
text: Viking Therapeutics, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, priced its public stock offering at $85 per share, totaling approximately $550 million in gross proceeds before underwriting costs. The company sold 6,471,000 shares of common stock, with underwriters receiving a 30-day option to purchase an additional 970,650 shares. The offering closed around March 4, 2024. Viking stated it currently intends to use the net proceeds from the offering for continued development of its VK2809, VK2735 and VK0214 programs and for general research and development, working capital and general corporate purposes. Morgan Stanley, Leerink Partners, William Blair, Raymond James, Stifel, and Truist Securities served as joint book-running managers, with Oppenheimer & Co. as lead manager. The San Diego-based company focuses on developing therapies for metabolic and endocrine disorders. Its lead programs include VK2809 for liver disease, VK2735 for metabolic disorders, and VK0214 for rare X-linked adrenoleukodystrophy. The company licenses technology from Ligand Pharmaceuticals Incorporated.
